---
title: "Programming for Applications"
subtitle: "In-Class Exercise 1"
author: "Yu-You Liou"
date: today
institute: "Shih Chien University"
format:
  revealjs:
    html-math-method: katex
smaller: true
theme: serif
footer: "R in a Nutshell: A Desktop Quick Reference"
editor: source
slide-number: true
scrollable: false
transition: "none"
menu:
  useTextContentForMissingTitles: false
  hideMissingTitles: true
  side: 'left'
  titleSelector: 'h1'
---

## Question 1

:::{.callout-warning}
## Addition
Evaluate $1 + 1$ in R.

:::

---

## Question 2

:::{.callout-warning}
## Multiplication
Evaluate $3 \times 4$ in R.

:::
